c.d: Cleanliness and ease of navigation within the app.
Availability on multiple operating systems (iOS, Android, Web, Desktop).

c.d: Availability of features like variable playback speed, trim silence, volume boost, offline playback, sleep timer, and organizational tools.
Cost of the app and its premium features (free, subscription, one-time purchase).

c.d: Ease of finding and discovering new podcasts.
